name: clawdbot-filesystem
tagline: ClawHub (77★): Advanced filesystem operations - listing, searching, batch processing, and directory analysis for Clawdbot
verdict: The command reference documents flags like --path and --recursive but never defines --older-than, which the example actually relies on - and there's no delete/remove command at all, so an agent following this skill has no real way to clean up files despite that being the point.

highlights.summary: The `filesystem list` Command Reference (lines 62-68) documents only --path/-p, --recursive/-r, --filter/-f, --details/-d, --sort/-s, --format — it never defines --older-than, whic
The Command Reference has no delete/remove command at all (only list, search, copy, tree, analyze), so an agent following this example has no documented way to actually clean the f
No guidance anywhere covers what to do if the clone/install fails or the `filesystem` binary is missing/unauthorized; the 'Safety Features' bullets (lines 171-177) only advertise t
